calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-033b GAP-8 evidence-grade trained-OFC-head BEHAVIOURAL devaluation+discrimination (frozen vs trainable head; OFC-bias-driven candidate-selection shift/separation)
items.note: Closes commitment_closure:GAP-8 -- the evidence-grade, governance-weighting trained-OFC-head BEHAVIOURAL validation (SD-033b candidate -> provisional). The trained-OFC-head substrate landed 2026-06-09 (ree-v3 main 382db2c: OFCConfig.train_state_bias_head + OFCAnalog.bias_head_parameters()); V3-EXQ-485d substrate-readiness PASSed (ARM_1 head weight-delta 0.231 >> 1e-3, the E3 gradient reaches+moves the head). Predecessors V3-EXQ-485b (devaluation) + 485c (task-role discrimination) validated both MECH-263 signatures at the REPRESENTATION level (state_code cosine distance) on the FROZEN head, reviewed 2026-06-04; this advances both to the BEHAVIOUR level on the TRAINED head. 2-arm frozen-vs-trainable OFC head, OFC isolated (gated_policy/dACC/lateral_pfc OFF), ofc_harm_dim>0 (aversive devaluation in the z_harm domain per the 485b substrate finding -- OFC reads only z_world+z_harm, no appetitive input), on the SD-054 bipartite reef/forage env. Phased training (485d machinery): P0 encoder warmup -> P1 head REINFORCE -> P2 behavioural eval. BEHAVIOUR = OFC-bias-driven candidate-selection distribution (softmax over -compute_bias) over a fixed bank of real candidate first-step z_world summaries, with the OFC as the SOLE bias channel (modulatory-bias-selection-authority deliberately OFF so the MECH-263 signal is not confounded with the separate 604a/643 drowning question). C1 devaluation: trained-head selection TV shift when z_harm is dropped at a fixed state, beyond the frozen control; C2 discrimination: trained-head selection separation across two perceptually-matched task-role histories vs within-context jitter (ratio>=3); C3: frozen head (bias==0 -> exactly-uniform selection) silent -- the GAP-1-analogue silence control proving the signature requires the trained head. claim_ids=[SD-033b,MECH-263], experiment_purpose=evidence, evidence_direction_per_claim emitted. SAME-STATISTIC non-vacuity gate (V3-EXQ-643 lesson): readiness asserts the trained-head bias cross-candidate RANGE on the high-threat positive control > 1e-3 (RANGE not magnitude -- the load-bearing selection DVs can be non-zero only if the bias has cross-candidate range; a clamp-saturated head has large |bias| but ~0 range, the 485d C3 concern) AND head weight-delta > 1e-3; below-floor (clamp-saturated/untrained) -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory, re-queue at larger P1 budget / ofc_bias_scale), NEVER a false SD-033b weakens. PASS=readiness AND C1 AND C2 AND C3 on >=2/3 seeds (supports both claims); readiness-met-but-DVs-fail -> weakens (honest; route /failure-autopsy before stamping). 2 arms x 3 seeds [0,1,2]; P0 30 ep + P1 60 ep, 100 steps/ep; per-cell reset_all_rng + arm_fingerprint (arm_cell). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (0 readiness-warnings, arm-fingerprint OK); dry-run PASS end-to-end (frozen arm silent: deval_shift 0 / sep_ratio 0; trainable arm head_delta 0.040 + bias_range 0.0013 + discrimination fires; self-routes substrate_not_ready at 1-seed toy scale as designed since readiness needs >=2/3 seeds). working-tree-vs-HEAD queue audit clean before append (concurrent implement-substrate-crf-availability-maintenance session's untracked script/entry not swept). Runner NOT started.

items.title: ARC-063 crf-availability-maintenance CRF-readiness diagnostic: maintained-pool gate (crf_maintained_pairwise_dist>0.1 AND crf_n_maintained_reactivatable>=2), NOT crf_frac_active; ARM_2 maintenance vs ARM_1 no-maintenance persistence-collapse; supersedes V3-EXQ-666
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[], non_contributory) for the 2026-06-11 crf-availability-maintenance amend (ree-v3 1d04e51) routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-666 + targeted_review_arc_063_crf_rule_cell_persistence (B-leaning verdict). READOUT REDEFINED vs 666: gate on the MAINTAINED pool not crf_frac_active (the averaged-activity artefact for a sparsely-matched pool). 3 arms x 3 seeds: ARM_0_OFF (legacy churn control) / ARM_1_MATURE_E2CTX (differentiates but persistence collapses, reproduces 666) / ARM_2_MATURE_E2CTX_MAINTENANCE (the fix). PASS = ARM_2 clears maintained-pool gate on >=2/3 AND ARM_1 does not, with non-vacuity (all cells mint >=2 AND e2ctx arms differentiate, same-statistic). PASS flips substrate_queue crf-availability-maintenance ready=True + unblocks the 654c GAP-B behavioural re-run (separate later session). Runner not started.

items.title: MECH-319 accumulated ghost-write arbitration-drift / overcommitment evidence (2nd contributory entry; sustained replay regime, distinct from 628 single-step)
items.note: Second distinct MECH-319 evidence entry for the min_experimental_entries=2 promotion gate. Tests the claim's other pre-registered V3 path (overcommitment/drift over a SUSTAINED replay regime) vs 628's single-step rule_state divergence. Does NOT supersede 628. Pure-arithmetic (no training); fast. Same-statistic C_admit_live non-vacuity gate self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue->non_contributory, never a false weakens.

items.title: SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance bridge behavioural retest REDESIGN (headroom + continuous survival metric); successor to 603l
items.note: Routing output of failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-603l_2026-06-10. REDESIGN carrying BOTH fixes: (a) harder Stage-H regime (num_hazards 4->6, proximity_harm 0.10->0.15) at full uniform 603k+603j substrate for headroom so ARM_BASE_IA_ONLY sits below the binary survival ceiling; (b) continuous mean Stage-H survival duration (mean episode length) as the load-bearing PRIMARY discrimination metric (full-bridge lift >=10% over base), binary G_H demoted to supplementary. Keeps the 5-arm discriminative harness + readiness/non-vacuity net (PAG freezes + ilPFC gate engage on base, each enabled bridge half credits >=2/3, base harm landscape discriminative >=2/3, else substrate_not_ready_requeue). claim_ids=[SD-059,MECH-358] multi-claim evidence; evidence_direction_per_claim. depends_on 603i/603j/603k. dry-run PASS end-to-end (self-routes substrate_not_ready at toy budget, as designed).

items.title: ARC-065 GAP-A R1.b matched-entropy behavioural falsifier on the V3-EXQ-662-validated route-range substrate (supersedes 569f)
items.note: GAP-A behavioural retest successor to V3-EXQ-569f, routed by confirmed failure_autopsy_569f-661-654a_2026-06-10. Same 3-arm matched-entropy R1.a/R1.b decision rule; route-range substrate ON all arms (use_modulatory_channel_routing + source=cand_world_summary + authority gain 0.5, V3-EXQ-662-validated) so the e2_world_forward channel range reaches committed action (569f bit-identical-entropy washout). candidate_summary_source is the single swept variable. P0 route-range readiness gate (ARM_1 modulatory_channel_route_range > floor >=2/3 seeds) self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue below floor -> non_contributory, never a weakens. claim_ids=[ARC-065] only. NOTE: recovered from a phase3-queue snapshot rebase conflict (re-appended onto the re-materialised snapshot).

items.title: MECH-341 within-class-representative-diversity GRADED confirmation, READOUT REDESIGN of V3-EXQ-660a (windowed H(rep|class) + selected/available efficiency + readout-sensitivity gate); supersedes 660a
items.note: behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-B. READOUT-REDESIGN successor to V3-EXQ-660a, routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-660a_2026-06-11 (660a self-routed weakens but adjudicated non_contributory/measurement_test_design_defect: phase-aggregate H(rep|class) SATURATED -- abs sampled entropy flat ~4.6-4.9 while availability rose 5->34, C_ABS failed -- and tick-count-confounded -- seed-43 ~10k ticks ~6.3 nats both arms vs seeds 42/44 ~1-2k ticks ~3.7-4.6 -- couldnt register a per-decision graded benefit). SAME question + SAME agent/arms/env/budget; ONLY the readout + a readout-sensitivity gate change. PRIMARY readout now windowed_rep_cond_entropy = mean over fixed 50-tick windows of H(rep|class) (removes tick-count confound; per-class within-window entropy capped at log(min(ticks_for_class, available_distinct)) -> rises with availability not saturates) + a normalised [0,1] selected/available within-class efficiency secondary; 660a phase-aggregate metric carried per-cell for the saturation contrast. TWO readiness gates before C_GRADED scores: (1) INPUT availability rises across K (== 660a) AND (2) NEW readout-sensitivity gate -- SAMPLED-arm windowed-H RANGE across K >= 0.05 nats (SAME statistic C_GRADED routes its lift on, asserted as RANGE on positive control, NOT magnitude). Either readiness UNMET -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory, NEVER weakens -- the 660a fix). Only with BOTH readiness MET is a flat lift a GENUINE weakens. C_GRADED (PRIMARY, windowed): per-seed paired lift Delta(K)=sampled-legacy monotone-nondecreasing across K AND Delta(128)-Delta(16)>=0.05 nats on >=2/3 seeds. claim_ids=[MECH-341], evidence; supersedes V3-EXQ-660a (660 stays standing). 8 arms (2 lever x 4 K=16/32/64/128) x 3 seeds [42,43,44]; P0 30 ep instrument-OFF + P1 60 ep instrument-ON, 200 steps/ep. validate_experiments --strict OK (0 readiness-warnings); dry-run PASS end-to-end. Re-applied on phase3-queue snapshot 02c9c3f after a writer-race rebase conflict (snapshot-race recovery, /queue-experiment Step 8). On PASS: within-class GRADED sub-axis confirmed load-bearing (governance ratifies; do NOT auto-flip default). On weakens-under-sensitive-readout: genuine negative -> Q-054 + arc_062 GAP-B.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.

items.title: Q-043 exploration-magnitude sweep: 591c-lineage curriculum Phase 0->1 reachability x joint noise_floor_alpha/curiosity_weight scale above defaults
items.note: PRIMARY routing output of failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-591c_2026-06-11 (confirmed). Q-043 (registered open_question; relative-weight calibration of MECH-313 noise floor + MECH-314 curiosity) magnitude-scale sweep. Re-runs the EXACT 591c InfantCurriculumScheduler Phase 0->1 reachability probe (same 5 seeds 42-46, 160 ep x 200 steps, same landed H_POS_FRAC_OF_MAX=0.20 gate -- UNCHANGED) at 4 JOINT magnitude scales applied to BOTH knobs above their landed defaults: S=1x (alpha 0.1/cw 0.05, reproduces 591c anchor) / 2x / 4x / 8x (cw scales all three MECH-314 sub-flavour weights). FORK: (a) the worst-case collapse seed escapes Phase 0 with GENUINE exploration at some scale above default -> config-only fix (raise ARC-065 default magnitudes); (b) it stays collapsed at every scale (incl 8x) -> active Phase-0 exploration-shaping substrate required (passive noise+curiosity an insufficient translation of actively-driven early-dev exploration). experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[Q-043] (single claim, no per-claim direction needed). LOAD-BEARING readiness/non-vacuity (V3-EXQ-643 same-statistic lesson): on the healthy-seed positive control, the RANGE across magnitude arms of the healthy-seed-averaged h_pos_mean must clear 0.05 (SAME h_pos statistic the rescue criterion routes on) else substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a substrate verdict). Gate threshold + genuine-exploration definition UNCHANGED -- the seed-45 gate-permissiveness brittleness is a SEPARATE ARC-046 K-of-N/EMA follow-on, explicitly OUT OF SCOPE; lowering the Phase 0->1 threshold is NOT the route. Multi-arm (seed x scale) grid with per-cell RNG reset + arm_fingerprint (arm_cell). validate_experiments --strict OK (0 readiness-warnings). Dry-run PASS end-to-end (self-routes substrate_not_ready at 2-ep toy scale as designed; healthy seed 42 h_pos 0.693->0.865 from 1x->8x confirms the swept knobs move exploration). working-tree-vs-HEAD queue audit clean before append (concurrent V3-EXQ-660b session's untracked script not swept).

items.title: MECH-314a per-candidate RBF novelty Goldilocks calibration on the 648a-validated e2_world_forward substrate (sweep modulatory_authority_gain -- the post-643a magnitude knob)
items.note: The MECH-314a-Phase-2-impl re-queue path, unblocked 2026-06-11 by the V3-EXQ-648a load-bearing C2 PASS (per-candidate curiosity bias confirmed non-zero-RANGE on the e2.world_forward-fed substrate; gapA-cluster autopsy 2026-06-07). FIRST behavioural-evidence run for MECH-314a (the 590/590a lineage tested MECH-111 broadcast novelty -- a DIFFERENT mechanism -- so NO inherited claim_ids; not a supersede). Builds on the 648a-validated substrate (curiosity_candidate_source=e2_world_forward + SD-056 online + rollout-norm clamp + SP-CEM + V_s) with MECH-314a curiosity as the SOLE modulatory channel (dacc/lateral_pfc/ofc/mech295/tonic_vigor/noise_floor/e3_score_diversity all OFF) and the 643a-validated modulatory-selection-authority ON. SWEPT KNOB = modulatory_authority_gain {0.0,0.25,0.5,1.0,2.0}, NOT curiosity_novelty_weight: the authority renormalizes the combined modulatory range to gain*raw_score_range, so with curiosity the sole channel the weight (and the per-candidate pattern is scale-invariant too) is WASHED OUT -- sweeping it reproduces the 590a degenerate byte-identical-arms null (substrate_queue do_not_adopt_from_590a). The faithful post-643a magnitude knob is the authority gain (gain=0 = curiosity present+ranged but NO selection authority = behavioural control). curiosity_novelty_weight held FIXED at 0.25 (648a value) so the channel has stable per-candidate range to amplify. DV = env pos_entropy exploration (the 590-lineage H_pos), self-contained selected-action class entropy secondary. PASS (supports MECH-314a) = readiness met AND best non-zero gain lifts H_pos over the gain=0 control by >=0.05 on >=2/3 seeds (paired); nonmonotone=inverted-U over-authority ceiling reported. SAME-STATISTIC non-vacuity (V3-EXQ-643 lesson): readiness leg1 curiosity_bias_range>1e-4 on the highest-gain arm (channel live; the 643a scaling-zero guard) + leg2 H_pos RANGE across gain arms >=0.05 (the EXACT statistic the Goldilocks routes on) + leg3 max cand_world_pairwise_dist finite<1e6 (643a explosion guard). Any leg below floor -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory), NEVER a MECH-314a weakens; readiness-met-but-no-lift -> does_not_support (FAIL). 5 gains x 3 seeds [42,43,44]; P0 60 ep SD-056 warmup + P1 30 ep measurement, 200 steps/ep; per-cell reset_all_rng + arm_fingerprint (online-e2 stateful -> reuse-ineligible). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (0 readiness-warnings, arm-fingerprint OK); dry-run PASS end-to-end (all 5 arms run, progress+verdict lines emit, pos_entropy reads -- control 0.58 vs ARM_G25 0.86, authority gain moves exploration; self-routes substrate_not_ready at 2-ep toy scale as designed -- SD-056 untrained so the curiosity channel collapses). working-tree-vs-HEAD queue audit clean before append (concurrent claimed items 514m/603o/660b/655/667 untouched). On PASS: adopt the Goldilocks gain for the curiosity channel + section-8 MECH-314a/MECH-314/ARC-065 governance touch (governance applies; not here). Runner NOT started.

items.title: MECH-329 wanting-before-liking developmental goal seeding sequence (3-condition infant curriculum; super-ordinal anchor formation)
items.note: Proposal EXP-0138 (MECH-329). Tests the wanting-before-liking temporal ordering hypothesis: approach-drive (z_goal) seeds super-ordinal goal anchors BEFORE hedonic evaluation (benefit_eval) calibrates. 3 conditions (matched seeds): wanting_first (z_goal Phase 0-1, benefit_eval Phase 2+), liking_first (benefit_eval Phase 0-1, z_goal Phase 2+), both_delayed (neither until Phase 2). Each runs 4-phase infant curriculum with SuperOrdinalGoalMemory writes enabled Phase 0-1 (child) and frozen at Phase 2 entry. C1: wanting_first anchor_count >= liking_first + 2 (wanting seeds more diverse anchors early). C2: wanting_first p01_writes >= liking_first + 3 (wanting writes happen earlier/more frequently). C3: wanting_first p01_mean_complexity >= both_delayed + 0.05 (wanting-driven contacts span more novel contexts). C4: both_delayed anchor_count >= 1 (substrate sanity). PASS = all 4 criteria on single matched seed. claim_ids=[MECH-329, MECH-189] (tests MECH-329 temporal ordering + validates MECH-189 SuperOrdinalGoalMemory substrate in phased regime). First MECH-329 experimental evidence entry. Smoke test: dry-run PASS, agent build with use_super_ordinal_goal_anchors verified. Queued 2026-06-11T08:50:09Z.

items.title: INV-048 pharmacological sleep disruption equivalence: REM-suppressed vs SWS-suppressed vs no-sleep attribution pipeline degradation
items.note: EXP-0145 dispatch: tests INV-048 prediction that pharmacological sleep phase disruption (REM suppression like antidepressants, SWS suppression like benzodiazepines) produces attribution pipeline degradation equivalent to behavioral sleep deprivation, proportional to which phases are disrupted. Four arms (N=3 seeds each, K=5 cycles): ARM_A normal (SWS+REM), ARM_B REM-suppressed (SWS only), ARM_C SWS-suppressed (REM only), ARM_D no-sleep (neither). Deterministic two-context prototypes (safe vs dangerous). Metrics: slot_differentiation (schema organization), harm_discrimination (attribution performance), manipulation checks (sws_writes, rem_rollouts). PASS = (C1:ARM_A slot_diff > ARM_C+0.05 AND C2:ARM_A > ARM_D+0.05 AND C3:ARM_A harm_disc > ARM_D+0.10) OR (C1 AND C4:ARM_A harm_disc > ARM_B+0.05) on >=2/3 seeds. Supports INV-048 pharmacological-equivalence principle. Smoke test clean (manipulation checks fire correctly, all arms execute).

items.title: MECH-025b precision-responsibility attribution: test whether high-precision actions accumulate proportionally more residue than low-precision actions
items.note: EXP-0150 dispatch: tests MECH-025b claim that precision level modulates responsibility attribution. Measures correlation between E3.current_precision and ResidueField accumulation during committed steps. Two key metrics: (1) Pearson r(precision, residue_delta) should be positive, (2) high-precision steps (above median) should accumulate proportionally more residue per harm than low-precision steps. PASS requires C1: precision_residue_correlation > 0.15, C2: high_precision_residue_ratio > 1.1, C3: committed_step_count >= 20, C4: world_forward_r2 > 0.05 (E2 functional), C5: harm_pred_std > 0.01 (E3 not collapsed), C6: no fatal errors. Smoke test clean (36 committed steps, no crashes).
